present at the time of inpatient admission 
1 = Unreported/Not used. Exempt from POA reporting 
Null/missing = Source value is missing, unknown, or not on the valid value list or within the range of 
valid values 

COMMENT: POA indicator is used to identify certain preventable conditions that are: 

(a) high cost or high volume or both, 

(b) result in the assignment of a case to a Diagnosis Related Group (DRG)*
